series_metadata.series_description: File contains the daily activity reports of field inspectors and field supervisors.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: paper copy in operating area converted machine readable format. Upon confirmation that machine readable format has been checked quality and completeness, paper copy. ; Electronic: Maintain machine readable format four years ; Microform: microfilm four years created
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred
